voe 0.1.0
  • Reference

Compute VoE for a fixed number of adjustors

Source: R/vibration.R
conductVibrationForK.Rd

Fits all combinations of k covariates from adjustby added to base_formula and collects coefficient estimates, p-values, and BIC.

Usage

conductVibrationForK(
  base_formula,
  dataFrame,
  adjustby,
  k = 1,
  family = c("gaussian", "binomial", "cox"),
  print_progress = TRUE,
  ...
)

Arguments

base_formula

A formula specifying the base model (exposure + forced covariates).

dataFrame

A data frame containing all variables.

adjustby

A formula or character vector of candidate adjustment variables.

k

Number of adjustors to include in each model.

family

One of "gaussian", "binomial", or "cox".

print_progress

Logical; print progress to console.

...

Additional arguments passed to run_model().

Value

A list with components vibration, bic, k, combinations, family, base_formula, and adjust.
